S.FORM: tmgjiyal dxgal Tnqian 1914 hngkawas, 6 idas, 14-24 jiyax mtgjiyal alang Tnqian. 19 jiyax wada mangal alang Dowras ka mrata Nihung == pnyahan kari ==
S.PHON: tmgɟijal dxgal tnqian **** ħŋkawas, * idas, **-** ɟijax mtgɟijal alaŋ tnqian. ** ɟijax wada maŋal alaŋ dowɾas ka mɾata niħuŋ == pnjaħan kaɾi ==
